1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bbox

2.description: get 1km grid cells within municipality bbox

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons within municipality bbox (stormflo200ar_klimaarna)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per grid cell (group by id)

6.description: count distinct grid cells intersecting storm-flood polygons

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy,
       omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade AS geom
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "geom"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["id"]
-- metric_column: "objid"
-- metric_as: "min_objid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
